title: Change Management Playbook
objective: Gate every service and MCP change through deterministic validation, approval-tier checks, and explicit rollback posture.
trigger_conditions: A service contract change is proposed.
An MCP contract or capability change is proposed.
A service-node runtime upgrade requires central-governance handoff evidence.
execution_steps: Validate against schemas and fixed JSON contract set.
Confirm policy profile and MCP allowlist compliance.
Run validation, determinism, and benchmark gates.
For service-node runtime upgrades, verify staging automation and architect-gated production release.
rollback_condition: Approval tier requirements are not satisfied.
evidence_outputs: Validated change set with trace linkage.
